commands.review_summary:
The branch routes category-filtered plugin install sorting to packagePluginCategorySearchDigest install indexes, syncs digest stats from package stat events, adds a dry-run cursor backfill, lowers the package stat event batch, and adds focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main sends category-filtered sort=installs through the package-table sorted path before category digest routing, so category filtering happens after package pagination. I did not run a live Convex dataset reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this member-authored PR needs normal maintainer review and explicit acceptance of the Convex index/backfill rollout.

target.title: Superseded category plugin install sorting
target.body:
## Summary

This PR has been audited against current `main` and now has no remaining code diff.

Current `main` already contains the useful parts:

- category-filtered plugin listings use `packagePluginCategorySearchDigest` sorted indexes for `sort=installs`
- category digest schema indexes exist for installs/downloads/recommended paths
- package stat event processing already recalculates package recommendation scores
- package digest stats stay synced through the existing package write trigger path

The old branch-only pieces were dropped during cleanup:

- `patchPackageSearchDigestStats`: redundant with package triggers
- `backfillPackageDigestStatsInternal`: redundant with trigger-backed digest sync
- package stat batch-size reduction: no longer justified once direct digest stat fanout was removed
- package index selector refactor: readability-only and conflicted with newer topic/category query code on `main`

## Verification

- `git diff --exit-code origin/main...HEAD` passed: no remaining PR diff
- `git diff --exit-code origin/main..HEAD` passed: branch tree equals `main`
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/packages.stats.test.ts` passed: 2 files, 254 tests
- `bunx tsc --noEmit` passed after refreshing this worktree's dependencies with `bun install`

## Merge / Close

No merge is needed. The branch now matches `main`, so this PR can be closed as superseded.
target.author: jesse-merhi
